steps.title: Identify the goal's requirement
steps.content: The student needs to explain what chapter 1 specifically covers. The notes state that chapter 1 outlines the origins and use of the term nostalgia.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A correctly uses the note stating that chapter 1 outlines the origins and use of nostalgia.
Choice B cites the wrong chapter, choice C mixes multiple chapters without focusing on chapter 1, and choice D generalizes to the whole book rather than chapter 1.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
